test-method.name: TC17_verifyAdminJobPostingUIComponentsAreVisible
test-method.description: TS04_TC17: Verify all Admin Job Posting UI components are visible

test-method.name: TC18_verifyInvalidJobDetailsAreRejectedUsingECP
test-method.description: TS04_TC18_ECP: Verify invalid equivalence-class job details are rejected

exception.message: The following asserts failed: Validation error should display for numeric-only company name expected [true] but found [false], Validation error should display for numeric-only job title expected [true] but found [false], Validation error should display for numeric-only location expected [true] but found [false], Validation error should display for numeric-only required skill expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Validation error should display for numeric-only company name expected [true] but found [false], Validation error should display for numeric-only job title expected [true] but found [false], Validation error should display for numeric-only location expected [true] but found [false], Validation error should test-method.name: TC19_verifyMandatoryFieldValidationMessagesForBlankForm
test-method.description: TS04_TC19: Verify validation messages when mandatory fields are blank

test-method.name: TC20_verifyCtcCgpaAndDeadlineBoundaryValidationUsingBVA
test-method.description: TS04_TC20_BVA: Verify invalid CTC, CGPA and past deadline boundary values are rejected
